mapper.insert: insert into community_complaint (id, user_id, user_name, user_phone, complaint_title, complaint_content, complaint_type, complaint_status, handle_user_id, handle_user_name, handle_result, handle_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{complaintTitle}, #{complaintContent}, #{complaintType}, #{complaintStatus}, #{handleUserId}, #{handleUserName}, #{handleResult}, #{handleTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update community_complaint set user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, complaint_title = #{complaintTitle}, complaint_content = #{complaintContent}, complaint_type = #{complaintType}, complaint_status = #{complaintStatus}, handle_user_id = #{handleUserId}, handle_user_name = #{handleUserName}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
